products.title: CompetitorScope
products.tagline: Real-Time Competitor Intelligence for iGaming Operators
products.description: Mid-tier iGaming operators rely on a junior analyst maintaining a stale spreadsheet of competitor bonuses, RTPs, and payment options. CompetitorScope automates it — daily scraping of welcome bonuses, VIP tiers, payment changes, and landing-page edits across 25 competitors, delivered as a weekly intel brief plus Slack alerts.
products.subject_line: Here's what your top 5 competitors changed this week.
after_bullets: Branded report ready for the CMO
products.why_works: The cold email IS the demo. A populated weekly report on the prospect's named top 5 competitors cannot be ignored by a CRM head.

products.title: AffiliateGuard+
products.tagline: Compliance + Lost-Revenue Audit for iGaming Affiliates
products.description: Operators in regulated markets carry strict liability for affiliate publishing. Most have hundreds of affiliates and zero scalable audit. AffiliateGuard+ scrapes every affiliate page promoting the brand, scores compliance violations and dead-link revenue leaks, and ships a regulator-ready evidence pack — two budget holders unlocked on one email.
products.subject_line: 47 affiliate pages are non-compliant — €38K in lost FTDs from dead links last month.
wins: Shortest sales cycle of the three
Bundle entry point for other products
before_bullets: Hundreds of affiliates, zero scalable audit
Dead links bleed FTDs daily, uncounted
Compliance and CMO operate in silos
Quarterly numbers miss with no explanation
after_bullets: Lost revenue anchored on real FTD value
products.why_works: Two budget holders unlocked on one email. The lost-revenue number is quantitative, immediate, and impossible to ignore.

products.title: GeoGen+
products.tagline: Per-Geo Landing Pages + Per-Streamer Branded Pages
products.description: Operators run hundreds of geo + language + bonus landing pages and rarely test them at volume. GeoGen+ generates geo/language variants, bonus-specific pages, and per-streamer branded pages on the same engine — speaks to Performance Marketing AND Affiliate heads, unlocks an enterprise SKU at €7.5–10K/mo.
products.subject_line: 10 ready-to-launch landing pages for your top 5 markets — plus 2 custom pages for your streamers.
wins: Speaks to two heads at the operator
before_bullets: Conversion lift left on the table
after_bullets: A/B variant batches in operator brand kit
Compliance rules baked in per market
Hand-deliverable preview link in cold email
products.why_works: Highest leverage of our existing AI website generator — repackaged for a buyer who pays roughly 20× more.
